assumptions.statement: Payment provider sandbox will be available from week 2
assumptions.invalidation_test: Request sandbox credentials in week 1; escalate if not issued within 3 business days

assumptions.statement: The dashboard can reuse the intranet component library
Customer data volume stays under one million records in year one
assumptions.invalidation_test: Monthly record-count check against the growth curve

assumptions.statement: No regulatory approval is needed for the payment flows
Two frontend engineers remain allocated for the full build phase
assumptions.invalidation_test: Weekly allocation check in the resource tool
